# name: # DOCTYPE-supplied default attribute values via <!ATTLIST>. The
# plugin parses every <!ATTLIST> declaration in the internal subset
# and, when an element instance does not carry an attribute, fills
# #REQUIRED and #IMPLIED contribute nothing because they have no
# default value; #FIXED "value" and bare quoted defaults are honoured.

input: <!DOCTYPE doc [<!ELEMENT doc EMPTY><!ATTLIST doc x CDATA "default">]><doc/>
<!DOCTYPE doc [<!ATTLIST doc a CDATA "A" b CDATA "B">]><doc/>
<!DOCTYPE doc [<!ATTLIST doc r CDATA #REQUIRED i CDATA #IMPLIED y CDATA "Y">]><doc/>
<!DOCTYPE root [<!ATTLIST a x CDATA "AX"><!ATTLIST b x CDATA "BX">]><root><a/><b/></root>
